scripts:
set properties on /content/dam/newshub/jcr:content
  set cq:conf{String} to /conf/newshub
  set jcr:title{String} to "News Hub Assets"
end

set ACL for newshub-content-reader
  allow jcr:read on /content/newshub/en/news
end

set ACL for newshub-content-writer
  allow jcr:read on /content/newshub/en
  allow jcr:write on /content/newshub/en
end
